form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[报关记录编码] materialId[物料] declarationNo[报关单号] partnerId[报关行] declarationDate[报关日期] =========>crossBorderAmounts[申报与税额]====== qtyDeclared[申报数量] uomDeclared[申报单位] amountDeclared[申报金额] currencyId[申报币种] exchangeRate[报关日汇率] amountFunctional[本位币金额] dutyAmount[关税金额] vatAmount[增值税金额] drawbackReceiptNo[退税收据号](2) ==========^sourceBill[业务单据回链]========= sourceBillType[业务单据类型] sourceBillCode[业务单据编码] ==========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

form.title: 查询条件
